---
title: "plotting functions"
author: "Andrea Chen"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r}

plot_lines_multi <- function(
  df,
  filters,
  ycol,  # NOW: can be length 1 or >1 (tick mode supports multi)
  labels = list(title = NULL, x = "Tick", y = ycol),
  show_rep = TRUE,
  cols = NULL,          # colors per filter (unchanged meaning)
  xlim = NULL,
  ylim = NULL,
  tick_col = "tick",
  lwd_mean = 3,
  lwd_rep  = 1,
  rep_alpha = 0.35,
  xcol = tick_col,
  ltys = NULL,           # NEW: line types per ycol (tick mode only)
) {
  stopifnot(is.data.frame(df), length(filters) >= 1, is.character(ycol))

  # xcol default
  if (is.null(xcol)) xcol <- tick_col

  # Only require tick_col if used as x
  if (identical(xcol, tick_col) && !tick_col %in% names(df)) {
    stop("tick column '", tick_col, "' not found.")
  }

  # Validate ycol(s)
  if (!all(ycol %in% names(df))) {
    bad <- ycol[!(ycol %in% names(df))]
    stop("y column(s) not found in df: ", paste(bad, collapse = ", "))
  }

  # Helper: apply one filter list to df (AND across fields; OR within vectors)
  apply_filter <- function(d, f) {
    keep <- rep(TRUE, nrow(d))
    for (nm in names(f)) {
      if (!nm %in% names(d)) next
      v <- f[[nm]]
      keep <- keep & (d[[nm]] %in% v)
    }
    d[keep, , drop = FALSE]
  }

  # Fix labels
  if (is.null(labels$y)) {
    labels$y <- if (length(ycol) == 1) ycol else paste(ycol, collapse = ", ")
  }
  if (is.null(labels$x) ||
      (identical(labels$x, "Tick") && !identical(xcol, tick_col))) {
    labels$x <- xcol
  }

  plot_tick_mode <- function(df, filters, ycols, labels, show_rep, cols, xlim, ylim,
                             tick_col, lwd_mean, lwd_rep, rep_alpha, ltys) {

    # colors per filter (original meaning)
    if (is.null(cols)) cols <- rep("black", length(filters))
    if (length(cols) < length(filters)) cols <- rep(cols, length.out = length(filters))

    # line types per y column
    if (is.null(ltys)) ltys <- rep(1, length(ycols))
    if (length(ltys) < length(ycols)) ltys <- rep(ltys, length.out = length(ycols))

    all_ticks <- numeric(0)
    all_vals  <- numeric(0)

    summaries <- lapply(seq_along(filters), function(i) {
      f <- filters[[i]]
      d <- apply_filter(df, f)

      d[[tick_col]] <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(d[[tick_col]]))
      d$rep         <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(d$rep))
      for (yc in ycols) d[[yc]] <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(d[[yc]]))

      keep <- is.finite(d[[tick_col]]) & is.finite(d$rep)
      for (yc in ycols) keep <- keep & is.finite(d[[yc]])
      d <- d[keep, , drop = FALSE]

      if (nrow(d) == 0) {
        return(list(
          reps = setNames(vector("list", length(ycols)), ycols),
          mean = setNames(vector("list", length(ycols)), ycols)
        ))
      }

      # split by rep (store per ycol)
      by_rep <- split(d, d$rep)

      reps_by_y <- lapply(ycols, function(yc) {
        lapply(by_rep, function(x) {
          o <- order(x[[tick_col]])
          data.frame(tick = x[[tick_col]][o], y = x[[yc]][o])
        })
      })
      names(reps_by_y) <- ycols

      # mean per tick (per ycol)
      mean_list <- lapply(ycols, function(yc) {
        m <- aggregate(d[[yc]], by = list(tick = d[[tick_col]]), FUN = mean, na.rm = TRUE)
        names(m)[2] <- "y"
        m <- m[order(m$tick), ]
        all_ticks <<- c(all_ticks, m$tick)
        all_vals  <<- c(all_vals,  m$y)
        m
      })
      names(mean_list) <- ycols

      list(reps = reps_by_y, mean = mean_list)
    })

    if (is.null(xlim)) xlim <- range(all_ticks, na.rm = TRUE)
    if (is.null(ylim)) ylim <- range(all_vals,  na.rm = TRUE)

    plot(NA, NA, xlim = xlim, ylim = ylim,
         xlab = labels$x, ylab = labels$y, main = labels$title)

    for (i in seq_along(summaries)) {
      col_i <- cols[i]
      s <- summaries[[i]]

      for (j in seq_along(ycols)) {
        yc <- ycols[j]
        lty_j <- ltys[j]

        # replicate points for this y column
        if (show_rep && length(s$reps[[yc]])) {
          col_rep <- tryCatch(adjustcolor(col_i, alpha.f = rep_alpha),
                              error = function(e) col_i)
          for (rp in s$reps[[yc]]) {
            if (nrow(rp) > 1) {
              lines(rp$tick, rp$y, col = col_rep, lwd = lwd_rep, pch = 16)
            }
          }
        }

        # mean line for this y column
        m <- s$mean[[yc]]
        if (!is.null(m) && nrow(m) > 1) {
          lines(m$tick, m$y, col = col_i, lwd = lwd_mean, lty = lty_j)
        }
      }
    }

    invisible(NULL)
  }

plot_generic_x_mode <- function(df, filters, ycol_single, labels, show_rep, cols,
                                xlim, ylim, xcol, lwd_mean, rep_alpha) {

  if (is.null(cols)) cols <- rep("black", length(filters))
  if (length(cols) < length(filters)) cols <- rep(cols, length.out = length(filters))

  subsets <- vector("list", length(filters))
  all_x <- numeric(0)
  all_y <- numeric(0)

  for (i in seq_along(filters)) {
    f <- filters[[i]]
    d <- apply_filter(df, f)

    if (nrow(d) == 0) {
      subsets[[i]] <- NULL
      next
    }

    d[[xcol]] <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(d[[xcol]]))
    d[[ycol_single]] <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(d[[ycol_single]]))
    d <- d[is.finite(d[[xcol]]) & is.finite(d[[ycol_single]]), , drop = FALSE]

    if (nrow(d) == 0) {
      subsets[[i]] <- NULL
      next
    }

    subsets[[i]] <- d
    all_x <- c(all_x, d[[xcol]])
    all_y <- c(all_y, d[[ycol_single]])
  }

  if (!length(all_x) || !length(all_y)) {
    warning("No data to plot after filtering.")
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  if (is.null(xlim)) xlim <- range(all_x, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (is.null(ylim)) ylim <- range(all_y, na.rm = TRUE)

  plot(NA, NA,
       xlim = xlim,
       ylim = ylim,
       xlab = labels$x,
       ylab = labels$y,
       main = labels$title)

  for (i in seq_along(subsets)) {
    d <- subsets[[i]]
    if (is.null(d) || nrow(d) == 0) next

    col_i <- cols[i]
    col_pts <- tryCatch(adjustcolor(col_i, alpha.f = rep_alpha),
                        error = function(e) col_i)

    x_vals <- sort(unique(d[[xcol]]))

    mean_x <- numeric(0)
    mean_y <- numeric(0)

    for (xv in x_vals) {
      dx <- d[d[[xcol]] == xv, , drop = FALSE]
      y <- dx[[ycol_single]]

      if (show_rep) {
        points(jitter(rep(xv, length(y)), amount = diff(range(all_x))*0.005),
               y,
               col = col_pts,
               pch = 16)
      }

      mu <- mean(y, na.rm = TRUE)
      sdv <- sd(y, na.rm = TRUE)
      if (!is.finite(sdv)) sdv <- 0

      arrows(xv, mu - sdv,
             xv, mu + sdv,
             angle = 90, code = 3, length = 0.04,
             col = col_i, lwd = max(1, lwd_mean * 0.5))

      points(xv, mu,
             pch = 21,
             bg = col_i,
             col = col_i,
             cex = 1.1)

      mean_x <- c(mean_x, xv)
      mean_y <- c(mean_y, mu)
    }

    if (length(mean_x) >= 2) {
      o <- order(mean_x)
      lines(mean_x[o], mean_y[o], col = col_i, lwd = lwd_mean)
    }
  }

  invisible(NULL)
}

  if (identical(xcol, tick_col)) {
    plot_tick_mode(df, filters, ycol, labels, show_rep, cols, xlim, ylim,
                   tick_col, lwd_mean, lwd_rep, rep_alpha, ltys)
  } else {
    # generic x mode: assume one column; if user passed multiple, take first
    plot_generic_x_mode(df, filters, ycol[1], labels, show_rep, cols,
                        xlim, ylim, xcol, lwd_mean, rep_alpha)
  }

  invisible(NULL)
}


```

```{r}
plot_lines_mean_sd_band <- function(
  df,
  filters,
  mean_col,
  sd_col,
  labels = list(title = NULL, x = "Tick", y = mean_col),
  show_rep = TRUE,
  cols = NULL,
  xlim = NULL,
  ylim = NULL,
  tick_col = "tick",
  lwd_mean = 3,
  lwd_rep  = 1,
  rep_alpha = 0.35,
  band_alpha = 0.20,     # NEW: transparency for shaded band
  xcol = tick_col
) {
  stopifnot(is.data.frame(df), length(filters) >= 1,
            is.character(mean_col), length(mean_col) == 1,
            is.character(sd_col),   length(sd_col)   == 1)

  if (!mean_col %in% names(df)) stop("mean_col '", mean_col, "' not found.")
  if (!sd_col   %in% names(df)) stop("sd_col '",   sd_col,   "' not found.")

  if (is.null(xcol)) xcol <- tick_col

  # Only require tick_col if used as x
  if (identical(xcol, tick_col) && !tick_col %in% names(df)) {
    stop("tick column '", tick_col, "' not found.")
  }

  # Colors per filter
  if (is.null(cols)) cols <- rep("black", length(filters))
  if (length(cols) < length(filters)) cols <- rep(cols, length.out = length(filters))

  # Helper: apply one filter list to df (AND across fields; OR within vectors)
  apply_filter <- function(d, f) {
    keep <- rep(TRUE, nrow(d))
    for (nm in names(f)) {
      if (!nm %in% names(d)) next
      v <- f[[nm]]
      keep <- keep & (d[[nm]] %in% v)
    }
    d[keep, , drop = FALSE]
  }

  # Fix labels
  if (is.null(labels$y)) labels$y <- mean_col
  if (is.null(labels$x) ||
      (identical(labels$x, "Tick") && !identical(xcol, tick_col))) {
    labels$x <- xcol
  }

  use_tick_mode <- identical(xcol, tick_col)

  if (use_tick_mode) {
    # ------------------ "tick mode" (aggregate by tick) ------------------
    all_ticks <- numeric(0)
    all_low   <- numeric(0)
    all_high  <- numeric(0)

    summaries <- lapply(seq_along(filters), function(i) {
      f <- filters[[i]]
      d <- apply_filter(df, f)

      d[[tick_col]] <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(d[[tick_col]]))
      d$rep         <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(d$rep))
      d[[mean_col]] <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(d[[mean_col]]))
      d[[sd_col]]   <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(d[[sd_col]]))

      d <- d[is.finite(d[[tick_col]]) & is.finite(d$rep) &
               is.finite(d[[mean_col]]) & is.finite(d[[sd_col]]),
             , drop = FALSE]

      if (nrow(d) == 0) {
        return(list(reps = list(),
                    sum = data.frame(tick = integer(0),
                                     mean = numeric(0),
                                     sd   = numeric(0),
                                     low  = numeric(0),
                                     high = numeric(0))))
      }

      # split by rep for optional background (mean_col only)
      by_rep <- split(d[, c(tick_col, mean_col)], d$rep)
      by_rep <- lapply(by_rep, function(x) {
        o <- order(x[[tick_col]])
        data.frame(tick = x[[tick_col]][o], y = x[[mean_col]][o])
      })

      # aggregate across reps per tick:
      # mean of means, and mean of sds
      mean_df <- aggregate(d[[mean_col]], by = list(tick = d[[tick_col]]),
                           FUN = mean, na.rm = TRUE)
      sd_df   <- aggregate(d[[sd_col]],   by = list(tick = d[[tick_col]]),
                           FUN = mean, na.rm = TRUE)

      names(mean_df)[2] <- "mean"
      names(sd_df)[2]   <- "sd"

      sum_df <- merge(mean_df, sd_df, by = "tick", all = TRUE)
      sum_df <- sum_df[order(sum_df$tick), ]
      sum_df$low  <- sum_df$mean - sum_df$sd
      sum_df$high <- sum_df$mean + sum_df$sd

      all_ticks <<- c(all_ticks, sum_df$tick)
      all_low   <<- c(all_low,   sum_df$low)
      all_high  <<- c(all_high,  sum_df$high)

      list(reps = by_rep, sum = sum_df)
    })

    # set plot region
    if (is.null(xlim)) xlim <- range(all_ticks, na.rm = TRUE)
    if (is.null(ylim)) ylim <- range(c(all_low, all_high), na.rm = TRUE)

    plot(NA, NA, xlim = xlim, ylim = ylim,
         xlab = labels$x, ylab = labels$y, main = labels$title)

    # draw per filter
    for (i in seq_along(summaries)) {
      col_i <- cols[i]
      s <- summaries[[i]]

      # background replicate points (mean only)
      if (show_rep && length(s$reps)) {
        col_rep <- tryCatch(adjustcolor(col_i, alpha.f = rep_alpha),
                            error = function(e) col_i)
        for (rp in s$reps) {
          if (nrow(rp) > 1) {
            points(rp$tick, rp$y, col = col_rep, lwd = lwd_rep, pch = 16)
          }
        }
      }

      # shaded band + mean line
      sum_df <- s$sum
      if (!is.null(sum_df) && nrow(sum_df) > 1) {
        band_col <- tryCatch(adjustcolor(col_i, alpha.f = band_alpha),
                             error = function(e) col_i)

        # polygon for mean ± mean(sd) per tick
        polygon(
          x = c(sum_df$tick, rev(sum_df$tick)),
          y = c(sum_df$low,  rev(sum_df$high)),
          col = band_col,
          border = NA
        )

        # mean line
        lines(sum_df$tick, sum_df$mean, col = col_i, lwd = lwd_mean)
      }
    }

  } else {
    # ------------------ "generic x mode" (single column logic preserved) ------------------
    all_x <- numeric(0)
    all_y <- numeric(0)
    subsets <- vector("list", length(filters))

    for (i in seq_along(filters)) {
      f <- filters[[i]]
      d <- apply_filter(df, f)
      if (nrow(d) == 0) {
        subsets[[i]] <- NULL
        next
      }

      d[[xcol]]     <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(d[[xcol]]))
      d[[mean_col]] <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(d[[mean_col]]))
      d[[sd_col]]   <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(d[[sd_col]]))

      d <- d[is.finite(d[[xcol]]) & is.finite(d[[mean_col]]) & is.finite(d[[sd_col]]),
             , drop = FALSE]

      if (nrow(d) == 0) {
        subsets[[i]] <- NULL
        next
      }

      subsets[[i]] <- d
      all_x <- c(all_x, d[[xcol]])
      all_y <- c(all_y, d[[mean_col]] - d[[sd_col]], d[[mean_col]] + d[[sd_col]])
    }

    if (!length(all_x) || !length(all_y)) {
      warning("No data to plot after filtering.")
      return(invisible(NULL))
    }

    if (is.null(xlim)) xlim <- range(all_x, na.rm = TRUE)
    if (is.null(ylim)) ylim <- range(all_y, na.rm = TRUE)

    plot(NA, NA, xlim = xlim, ylim = ylim,
         xlab = labels$x, ylab = labels$y, main = labels$title)

    for (i in seq_along(subsets)) {
      d <- subsets[[i]]
      if (is.null(d) || nrow(d) == 0) next

      col_i <- cols[i]
      col_pts <- tryCatch(adjustcolor(col_i, alpha.f = rep_alpha),
                          error = function(e) col_i)

      x  <- d[[xcol]]
      mu <- d[[mean_col]]
      sd <- d[[sd_col]]

      if (show_rep) points(x, mu, col = col_pts, pch = 16)

      # For generic x mode: shade pointwise band around observed mean values
      o <- order(x)
      x  <- x[o]; mu <- mu[o]; sd <- sd[o]

      band_col <- tryCatch(adjustcolor(col_i, alpha.f = band_alpha),
                           error = function(e) col_i)
      polygon(
        x = c(x, rev(x)),
        y = c(mu - sd, rev(mu + sd)),
        col = band_col,
        border = NA
      )
      lines(x, mu, col = col_i, lwd = lwd_mean)
    }
  }

  invisible(NULL)
}

```


```{r}
# --- helpers ---------------------------------------------------------------

# integer-named value columns
.value_cols_int <- function(df) grep("^[0-9]+$", names(df), value = TRUE)

# compute binned proportions per-rep and their across-rep mean
.binned_props_for_filter <- function(df, filter, generation, breaks) {
  d <- df
  if (!is.null(generation) && "generation" %in% names(d)) {
    # if generation is a range vector of length 2, keep rows in that range; if single value, keep rows equal to it
    if (length(generation) == 2) {
      d <- d[d$generation >= generation[1] & d$generation <= generation[2], , drop = FALSE]
    } else {
      d <- d[d$generation == generation, , drop = FALSE]
    }
  }
  if (length(filter)) {
    for (nm in names(filter)) if (nm %in% names(d)) d <- d[d[[nm]] == filter[[nm]], , drop = FALSE]
  }
  if (nrow(d) == 0) stop("No rows after applying generation/filter.")

  vcols <- .value_cols_int(d)
  if (!length(vcols)) stop("No integer-named value columns found.")

  breaks <- sort(as.numeric(breaks))
  x_min <- min(breaks); x_max <- max(breaks)
  mids  <- (breaks[-1] + breaks[-length(breaks)]) / 2

  reps <- sort(unique(d$rep))
  M <- matrix(NA_real_, nrow = length(reps), ncol = length(mids))

  for (i in seq_along(reps)) {
    dr <- d[d$rep == reps[i], , drop = FALSE]
    vals <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(unlist(dr[, vcols, drop = FALSE], use.names = FALSE)))
    vals <- vals[is.finite(vals) & vals >= x_min & vals <= x_max]
    if (!length(vals)) next
    h <- hist(vals, breaks = breaks, plot = FALSE, include.lowest = TRUE, right = FALSE)
    prop <- h$counts / sum(h$counts)              # proportions (sum to 1 within range)
    M[i, ] <- prop
  }

  list(mid = mids, mat = M, mean_prop = colMeans(M, na.rm = TRUE))
}

# --- main: plot histogram "lines" (across-rep mean), optional per-rep fades --
plot_hist_lines_multi <- function(
  df,
  filters,                           # list of filter lists: list(f1, f2, ...)
  generation,
  breaks,                            # numeric vector of bin edges (shared by all)
  labels = list(title = "Binned distributions", x = "Value", y = "Proportion"),
  cols = NULL,                       # colors per filter
  lwd = 4,
  show_rep = FALSE,                  # faded per-rep lines behind the mean
  rep_alpha = 0.2,
  rep_lwd = 1,
  add = FALSE,                    # add to existing plot?
  ymax = NULL,
  group_df = NULL,        # NEW: optional data frame with group tags for coloring
  n_threshold = c()
) {
  k <- length(filters)
  if (is.null(cols)) cols <- grDevices::hcl.colors(k, "Dark 2", rev = FALSE)

  # compute first, plot after (so y-limits fit all)
  series <- vector("list", k)
  for (i in seq_len(k)) {
    series[[i]] <- .binned_props_for_filter(df, filters[[i]], generation, breaks)
  }

  mids <- series[[1]]$mid
  if(is.null(ymax)){
    ymax <- max(vapply(series, function(s) max(s$mean_prop, na.rm = TRUE), 0), na.rm = TRUE)
    if (!is.finite(ymax) || ymax <= 0) ymax <- 1
  }
  if (!add) {
    plot(mids, series[[1]]$mean_prop, type = "n",
         xlab = labels$x, ylab = labels$y, main = labels$title,
         xlim = range(mids), ylim = c(0, 1.05 * ymax))
  }

  for (i in seq_len(k)) {
    si <- series[[i]]
    if (isTRUE(show_rep)) {
      rep_col <- grDevices::adjustcolor(cols[i], rep_alpha)
      for (r in seq_len(nrow(si$mat))) {
        yi <- si$mat[r, ]
        if (all(!is.finite(yi))) next
        lines(mids, yi, col = rep_col, lwd = rep_lwd)
      }
    }
    lines(mids, si$mean_prop, col = cols[i], lwd = lwd)
  }

  invisible(series)
}

# integer-named value columns
.value_cols_int <- function(df) grep("^[0-9]+$", names(df), value = TRUE)

# # per-replicate variance decomposition, then average across replicates
# .var_decomp_for_filter <- function(df, filter, generation) {
#   d <- df

#   if (!is.null(generation) && "generation" %in% names(d)) {
#     if (length(generation) == 2) {
#       d <- d[d$generation >= generation[1] & d$generation <= generation[2], , drop = FALSE]
#     } else {
#       d <- d[d$generation == generation, , drop = FALSE]
#     }
#   }

#   if (length(filter)) {
#     for (nm in names(filter)) {
#       if (nm %in% names(d)) d <- d[d[[nm]] == filter[[nm]], , drop = FALSE]
#     }
#   }

#   if (nrow(d) == 0) stop("No rows after applying generation/filter.")

#   vcols <- .value_cols_int(d)
#   if (!length(vcols)) stop("No integer-named value columns found.")

#   reps <- sort(unique(d$rep))

#   out <- data.frame(
#     rep = reps,
#     var_total = NA_real_,
#     var_within = NA_real_,
#     var_between = NA_real_
#   )

#   for (i in seq_along(reps)) {
#     dr <- d[d$rep == reps[i], , drop = FALSE]

#     vals <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(unlist(dr[, vcols, drop = FALSE], use.names = FALSE)))
#     vals <- vals[is.finite(vals)]

#     if (length(vals) < 2) next

#     vt <- var(vals)

#     # two-mode decomposition using kmeans
#     set.seed(1)
#     km <- tryCatch(kmeans(vals, centers = 2, nstart = 20), error = function(e) NULL)
#     if (is.null(km)) next

#     g1 <- vals[km$cluster == 1]
#     g2 <- vals[km$cluster == 2]

#     if (length(g1) < 2 || length(g2) < 2) next

#     p1 <- length(g1) / length(vals)
#     p2 <- length(g2) / length(vals)

#     mu1 <- mean(g1)
#     mu2 <- mean(g2)

#     v1 <- var(g1)
#     v2 <- var(g2)

#     vw <- p1 * v1 + p2 * v2
#     vb <- p1 * p2 * (mu1 - mu2)^2

#     out$var_total[i]   <- vt
#     out$var_within[i]  <- vw
#     out$var_between[i] <- vb
#   }

#   list(
#     per_rep = out,
#     mean_within  = mean(out$var_within,  na.rm = TRUE),
#     mean_between = mean(out$var_between, na.rm = TRUE),
#     mean_total   = mean(out$var_total,   na.rm = TRUE)
#   )
# }

```

```{r}
fit_decay_mean_traj <- function(df, xcol = "tick", ycol = "dif_z_opt",
                                tmin = 10000, tmax = 10100) {
  
  sub_df <- df[df[[xcol]] >= tmin & df[[xcol]] <= tmax, ]
  
  if (nrow(sub_df) == 0) {
    return(c(slope = NA, decay_const = NA, intercept = NA, r2 = NA))
  }
  
  # mean across reps for each generation
  mean_df <- aggregate(
    sub_df[[ycol]],
    by = list(tick = sub_df[[xcol]]),
    FUN = function(v) mean(v, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
  
  colnames(mean_df)[2] <- ycol
  
  mean_df <- mean_df[is.finite(mean_df[[ycol]]) & mean_df[[ycol]] > 0, ]
  
  if (nrow(mean_df) < 5) {
    return(c(slope = NA, decay_const = NA, intercept = NA, r2 = NA))
  }
  
  fit <- lm(log(mean_df[[ycol]]) ~ mean_df$tick)
  
  slope <- coef(fit)[2]
  intercept <- coef(fit)[1]
  r2 <- summary(fit)$r.squared
  
  c(
    slope,
     -slope,
    intercept,
    r2
  )
}

get_decay_summary_meantraj <- function(data_df,
                                       xcol = "tick",
                                       ycol = "dif_z_opt",
                                       tmin = 10000,
                                       tmax = 10100) {
  
  out_list <- list()
  idx <- 1
  
  for (reg in unique(data_df$reg)) {
    for (sz in sort(unique(data_df$shift_size))) {
      for (n in sort(unique(data_df$n))) {
        for (psi in sort(unique(data_df$psi))) {
          
          sub_df <- data_df[
            data_df$reg == reg &
            data_df$shift_size == sz &
            data_df$n == n &
            data_df$psi == psi,
          ]
          
          if (nrow(sub_df) == 0) next
          
          fit_res <- fit_decay_mean_traj(
            df = sub_df,
            xcol = xcol,
            ycol = ycol,
            tmin = tmin,
            tmax = tmax
          )
          
          out_list[[idx]] <- data.frame(
            reg = reg,
            shift_size = sz,
            n = n,
            psi = psi,
            slope = unname(fit_res[1]),
            decay_const = unname(fit_res[2]),
            intercept = unname(fit_res[3]),
            r2 = unname(fit_res[4])
          )
          
          idx <- idx + 1
        }
      }
    }
  }
  
  do.call(rbind, out_list)
}

```


```{r}
compute_aurc_one <- function(
  df,
  filter,
  ycol,
  tick_pre = 9999,
  tmin = 10000,
  tmax = 10100
) {
  d <- df
  for (nm in names(filter)) {
    if (nm %in% names(d)) d <- d[d[[nm]] == filter[[nm]], , drop = FALSE]
  }
  if (!nrow(d)) return(NA_real_)

  # average across reps per tick
  avg <- aggregate(d[[ycol]], by = list(tick = d$tick), FUN = mean)
  names(avg) <- c("tick", "y")
  avg <- avg[order(avg$tick), , drop = FALSE]

  # baseline
  b <- avg$y[avg$tick == tick_pre]
  if (!length(b) || !is.finite(b[1])) return(NA_real_)
  W_pre <- b[1]

  # window
  w <- avg[avg$tick >= tmin & avg$tick <= tmax, , drop = FALSE]
  if (!nrow(w)) return(NA_real_)

  sum(W_pre - w$y, na.rm = TRUE)
}

compute_aurc_grid <- function(
  df,
  reg_value,
  ns,
  psis,
  shift_sizes,
  ycol,
  tick_pre = 9999,
  tmin = 10000,
  tmax = 10100
) {
  out <- list()
  k <- 1

  for (sz in shift_sizes) {
    for (n in ns) {
      for (psi in psis) {
        filt <- list(reg = reg_value, shift_size = sz, n = n, psi = psi)
        aurc <- compute_aurc_one(
          df = df,
          filter = filt,
          ycol = ycol,
          tick_pre = tick_pre,
          tmin = tmin,
          tmax = tmax
        )
        out[[k]] <- data.frame(
          shift_size = sz,
          n = n,
          psi = psi,
          aurc = aurc,
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        )
        k <- k + 1
      }
    }
  }
  do.call(rbind, out)
}

plot_aurc_heatmap_simple <- function(
  aurc_df,
  ns,
  psis,
  shift_size,
  zlim = NULL,
  main = NULL,
  palette = "RdYlBu",
  na_col = "grey90",
  ncols = 100,
  legend_title = "AURC"
) {
  ss <- aurc_df[aurc_df$shift_size == shift_size, , drop = FALSE]

  # matrix: rows = psi, cols = n
  mat <- matrix(NA_real_,
                nrow = length(psis),
                ncol = length(ns),
                dimnames = list(psis, ns))

  ii <- match(ss$psi, psis)
  jj <- match(ss$n, ns)
  ok <- !is.na(ii) & !is.na(jj)
  mat[cbind(ii[ok], jj[ok])] <- ss$aurc[ok]

  if (is.null(zlim)) {
    vals <- mat[is.finite(mat)]
    if (!length(vals)) stop("No finite AURC values for plotting.")
    zlim <- range(vals)
  }

  cols <- hcl.colors(ncols, palette, rev = TRUE)

  # ---- layout: plot + legend ----
  layout(matrix(c(1, 2), nrow = 1), widths = c(1, 0.15))

  # ---- main heatmap ----
  par(mar = c(5, 5, 4, 1))
  image(
    x = seq_along(ns),
    y = seq_along(psis),
    z = t(mat),
    col = cols,
    zlim = zlim,
    xaxt = "n",
    yaxt = "n",
    xlab = "Group size n",
    ylab = expression(psi),
    main = main
  )
  axis(1, at = seq_along(ns), labels = ns)
  axis(2, at = seq_along(psis), labels = psis, las = 1)
  box()

  # overlay NA tiles
  for (i in seq_along(psis)) {
    for (j in seq_along(ns)) {
      if (!is.finite(mat[i, j])) {
        rect(j - 0.5, i - 0.5, j + 0.5, i + 0.5,
             col = na_col, border = NA)
      }
    }
  }

  # ---- legend ----
  par(mar = c(5, 1, 4, 4))
  plot.new()
  plot.window(xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = zlim)

  yseq <- seq(zlim[1], zlim[2], length.out = ncols + 1)
  for (i in seq_len(ncols)) {
    rect(0.2, yseq[i], 0.8, yseq[i + 1],
         col = cols[i], border = NA)
  }

  axis(4, las = 1)
  mtext(legend_title, side = 4, line = 2)

  invisible(mat)
}

```


```{r}
fit_exp_decay_window <- function(
  df,
  filter,
  tmin = 10000,
  tmax = 10100,
  time_col = "tick",
  y_col = "z_opt",
  rep_col = "rep",
  model = c("offset", "no_offset"),
  nls_control = nls.control(maxiter = 500, warnOnly = TRUE)
) {
  model <- match.arg(model)

  # 1) filter
  sub <- df
  for (nm in names(filter)) sub <- sub[sub[[nm]] == filter[[nm]], , drop = FALSE]

  # 2) window
  sub <- sub[sub[[time_col]] >= tmin & sub[[time_col]] <= tmax, , drop = FALSE]
  sub <- sub[is.finite(sub[[time_col]]) & is.finite(sub[[y_col]]), , drop = FALSE]

  if (nrow(sub) < 3) {
    return(list(converged = FALSE, message = "Not enough rows in window", params = NA, averaged = NULL, fit = NULL))
  }

  # 3) average reps per tick
  avg <- aggregate(sub[[y_col]], by = list(tick = sub[[time_col]]), FUN = mean)
  names(avg) <- c("tick", "z")
  avg <- avg[order(avg$tick), , drop = FALSE]

  if (nrow(avg) < 3) {
    return(list(converged = FALSE, message = "Not enough unique ticks after averaging", params = NA, averaged = avg, fit = NULL))
  }

  # 4) re-center time at tmin for numerical stability
  avg$t <- avg$tick - tmin

  # 5) starting values (robust for your shape)
  c0 <- tail(avg$z, 1)
  a0 <- avg$z[1] - c0
  if (!is.finite(a0) || abs(a0) < 1e-8) a0 <- sign(a0 + 1e-8) * 1e-3

  # pick b0 from early-to-late change if possible
  tspan <- max(avg$t)
  b0 <- 1 / max(tspan, 1)
  st <- if (model == "offset") list(a = a0, b = abs(b0), c = c0) else list(a = avg$z[1], b = abs(b0))

  # 6) fit
  if (model == "offset") {
    form <- z ~ c + a * exp(-b * t)
    fit <- try(nls(form, data = avg, start = st, control = nls_control), silent = TRUE)
  } else {
    form <- z ~ a * exp(-b * t)
    fit <- try(nls(form, data = avg, start = st[c("a","b")], control = nls_control), silent = TRUE)
  }

  if (inherits(fit, "try-error")) {
    return(list(converged = FALSE, message = as.character(fit), params = NA, averaged = avg, fit = NULL))
  }

  list(
    converged = TRUE,
    message = NULL,
    params = coef(fit),   # a, b, (c)
    averaged = avg,
    fit = fit
  )
}

```

```{r}
plot_first_jump_heatmap2 <- function(
  df,
  reg_value = "fit",
  ns,
  psis,
  shift_sizes,
  tick_pre = 9999,
  tick_post = 10000,
  time_col = "tick",
  rep_col = "rep",
  value_col = "z_mean",
  reg_col = "reg",
  n_col = "n",
  psi_col = "psi",
  shift_col = "shift_size",
  main_prefix = "First-generation jump (copy-the-best)",
  zlim = NULL,                    # recommend fixed across panels
  palette_name = "RdYlBu",
  ncols = 100,
  na_col = "grey90",
  file = NULL,
  width = 2200, height = 1800, res = 150
) {
  # --- filter to reg and two ticks ---
  sub <- df[df[[reg_col]] == reg_value &
              df[[time_col]] %in% c(tick_pre, tick_post), , drop = FALSE]

  needed <- c(time_col, rep_col, value_col, n_col, psi_col, shift_col)
  miss <- setdiff(needed, names(sub))
  if (length(miss)) stop("Missing columns: ", paste(miss, collapse = ", "))

  # --- per-rep jump ---
  wide <- reshape(
    sub[, c(rep_col, n_col, psi_col, shift_col, time_col, value_col)],
    idvar = c(rep_col, n_col, psi_col, shift_col),
    timevar = time_col,
    direction = "wide"
  )
  pre_name  <- paste0(value_col, ".", tick_pre)
  post_name <- paste0(value_col, ".", tick_post)
  if (!(pre_name %in% names(wide)) || !(post_name %in% names(wide))) {
    stop("Missing tick columns after reshape: ", pre_name, " / ", post_name)
  }
  wide$dz1 <- wide[[post_name]] - wide[[pre_name]]

  # --- average across replicates ---
  avg <- aggregate(
    wide$dz1,
    by = list(
      n = wide[[n_col]],
      psi = wide[[psi_col]],
      shift_size = wide[[shift_col]]
    ),
    FUN = mean,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
  names(avg)[4] <- "dz1_mean"

  # --- build mats per shift_size ---
  build_mat <- function(sz) {
    ss <- avg[avg$shift_size == sz, , drop = FALSE]
    mat <- matrix(NA_real_, nrow = length(psis), ncol = length(ns),
                  dimnames = list(psis, ns))
    ii <- match(ss$psi, psis)
    jj <- match(ss$n, ns)
    ok <- !is.na(ii) & !is.na(jj)
    mat[cbind(ii[ok], jj[ok])] <- ss$dz1_mean[ok]
    mat
  }
  mats <- lapply(shift_sizes, build_mat)
  names(mats) <- as.character(shift_sizes)

  # --- global zlim if not provided ---
  if (is.null(zlim)) {
    allv <- unlist(mats)
    zlim <- range(allv, na.rm = TRUE)
    if (!all(is.finite(zlim))) zlim <- c(0, 1)
  }

  cols <- hcl.colors(ncols, palette_name, rev = TRUE)

  # map z -> color index
  z_to_col <- function(z) {
    if (!is.finite(z)) return(na_col)
    # clamp into zlim and convert to 1..ncols
    u <- (z - zlim[1]) / (zlim[2] - zlim[1])
    u <- max(0, min(1, u))
    cols[1 + floor(u * (ncols - 1))]
  }

  # draw a tile heatmap for one matrix
  draw_tiles <- function(mat, sz) {
    # layout coordinates: columns are ns, rows are psis
    # We'll plot x as 1..length(ns), y as 1..length(psis)
    plot(NA,
         xlim = c(0.5, length(ns) + 0.5),
         ylim = c(0.5, length(psis) + 0.5),
         xaxt = "n", yaxt = "n",
         xlab = "Group size n",
         ylab = expression(psi),
         main = paste0("shift_size = ", sz, "\n",
                       expression(Delta*z == z - z))
    )
    axis(1, at = seq_along(ns), labels = ns)
    axis(2, at = seq_along(psis), labels = psis, las = 1)

    for (j in seq_along(ns)) {
      for (i in seq_along(psis)) {
        rect(xleft = j - 0.5, xright = j + 0.5,
             ybottom = i - 0.5, ytop = i + 0.5,
             col = z_to_col(mat[i, j]),
             border = "white", lwd = 1)
      }
    }
    box()
  }

  # --- device ---
  if (!is.null(file)) {
    png(file, width = width, height = height, res = res)
    on.exit(dev.off(), add = TRUE)
  }

  # --- multi-panel + one shared legend column ---
  k <- length(shift_sizes)
  # left panels + right legend column
  lay <- matrix(seq_len(k + 1), nrow = ceiling((k + 0) / 2), byrow = TRUE)
  # Force a 2-column panel grid, last column reserved for legend
  # Example for 4 sz: panels in 2x2, legend on right spanning rows
  layout(matrix(c(1, 2, 5,
                  3, 4, 5), nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE),
         widths = c(1, 1, 0.18))

  op <- par(no.readonly = TRUE)
  on.exit(par(op), add = TRUE)

  par(mar = c(4.5, 5, 4, 1))
  draw_tiles(mats[[1]], shift_sizes[1])
  par(mar = c(4.5, 5, 4, 1))
  draw_tiles(mats[[2]], shift_sizes[2])
  par(mar = c(4.5, 5, 4, 1))
  draw_tiles(mats[[3]], shift_sizes[3])
  par(mar = c(4.5, 5, 4, 1))
  draw_tiles(mats[[4]], shift_sizes[4])

  # legend (shared)
  par(mar = c(4.5, 1, 4, 4))
  plot.new()
  plot.window(xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = zlim)
  # draw color bar
  yseq <- seq(zlim[1], zlim[2], length.out = ncols + 1)
  for (i in seq_len(ncols)) {
    rect(0.2, yseq[i], 0.8, yseq[i + 1], col = cols[i], border = NA)
  }
  axis(4, las = 1)
  mtext(expression(Delta*z), side = 4, line = 2)

  # page title
  mtext(main_prefix, side = 3, outer = TRUE, line = 1, cex = 1.3)

  invisible(list(avg = avg, mats = mats, zlim = zlim))
}

```


```{r}
## ============================================================
## SELF-CONTAINED PDF COMPILER (does NOT rely on plot_genotype_heatmap)
##
## Output:
##  - one PDF per shift_size
##  - 6 pages per PDF: (type ∈ {genotype, phenotype}) × (reg ∈ {ave, fit, ext})
##  - each page is a grid: rows = psi (0, 0.5, 0.9), cols = n (2, 8, 20, 50)
##  - one shared colorbar on the right for the whole page
##  - unified color scale per page (shared zlim across all panels on that page)
##
## Assumptions about your data:
##  - genotype is WIDE with numeric column names "0","1",... (or phenotype too, if wide)
##  - metadata columns include: generation, reg, psi, n, shift_size, fluctuate_gap
##  - If phenotype is long-format (single column), set pheno_value_col below.
## ============================================================

# -------------- helpers: filtering & genotype/phenotype extraction ----------
.value_cols_int <- function(df) grep("^[0-9]+$", names(df), value = TRUE)

.apply_filter <- function(df, filter) {
  d <- df
  for (nm in names(filter)) {
    if (!nm %in% names(d)) next
    val <- filter[[nm]]
    if (is.null(val) || length(val) == 0) next
    d <- d[d[[nm]] == val, , drop = FALSE]
  }
  d
}

.reg_label <- function(reg) {
  if (reg == "fit") "copy the best" else
    if (reg == "ext") "copy the extreme" else
      if (reg == "ave") "copy the average" else reg
}

# -------------- build histogram matrix (bins × generations) -----------------
# Returns list(x=gens, y=mids, mat=bins×gens) where mat is proportion/count/density per generation.
.build_heatmat <- function(df, filter, xcol, breaks_vec,
                           mode = c("wide_numeric", "long_col"),
                           value_col = NULL,
                           z = c("prop", "count", "density")) {
  mode <- match.arg(mode)
  z <- match.arg(z)

  d <- .apply_filter(df, filter)
  if (!nrow(d)) return(NULL)
  if (!xcol %in% names(d)) stop("Missing xcol: ", xcol)

  # generations present (gappy is fine)
  gens <- sort(unique(d[[xcol]]))
  x <- as.numeric(gens)

  # binning
  breaks <- breaks_vec
  mids <- (breaks[-1] + breaks[-length(breaks)]) / 2
  lo <- min(breaks)
  hi <- max(breaks)

  # identify value source
  if (mode == "wide_numeric") {
    vcols <- .value_cols_int(d)
    if (!length(vcols)) stop("No numeric-named columns found for wide_numeric mode.")
  } else {
    if (is.null(value_col) || !value_col %in% names(d)) {
      stop("long_col mode requires value_col present in df.")
    }
  }

  mat <- matrix(0, nrow = length(mids), ncol = length(gens))

  for (j in seq_along(gens)) {
    g <- gens[j]
    dg <- d[d[[xcol]] == g, , drop = FALSE]

    vv <- if (mode == "wide_numeric") {
      as.numeric(unlist(dg[, vcols, drop = FALSE], use.names = FALSE))
    } else {
      as.numeric(dg[[value_col]])
    }
    vv <- vv[is.finite(vv)]
    vv <- vv[vv >= lo & vv <= hi]  # IMPORTANT: exclude outside range BEFORE hist

    h <- hist(vv, breaks = breaks, plot = FALSE)

    if (z == "count") {
      mat[, j] <- h$counts
    } else if (z == "prop") {
      s <- sum(h$counts)
      mat[, j] <- if (s > 0) h$counts / s else 0
    } else {
      mat[, j] <- h$density
    }
  }

  list(x = x, y = mids, mat = mat, gens = gens, breaks = breaks)
}

.plot_heat_panel <- function(hm, zlim, col, main = NULL, xlab = "", ylab = "",
                             axes = TRUE, box = TRUE) {
  if (is.null(hm)) {
    plot.new()
    if (!is.null(main)) title(main = main)
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  x <- hm$x
  y <- hm$y
  mat <- hm$mat

  # ---- make zeros NA ----
  mat_plot <- mat
  mat_plot[mat_plot == 0] <- NA

  # ---- save old background ----
  old_bg <- par("bg")
  par(bg = "black")

  plot(NA,
       xlim = range(x), ylim = range(y),
       xlab = xlab, ylab = ylab, main = main,
       xaxs = "i", yaxs = "i", axes = FALSE)

  image(x, y, t(mat_plot), col = col, zlim = zlim, add = TRUE)

  if (axes) { axis(1); axis(2) }
  if (box) box()

  # ---- restore background ----
  par(bg = old_bg)

  invisible(NULL)
}


# -------------- draw a shared colorbar in its own layout cell ---------------
.draw_colorbar_panel <- function(zlim, col, label = "Proportion", n = 120) {
  plot.new()
  plot.window(xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = zlim)

  yy <- seq(zlim[1], zlim[2], length.out = n + 1)
  cols <- if (length(col) == n) col else colorRampPalette(col)(n)

  for (i in seq_len(n)) {
    rect(0.25, yy[i], 0.60, yy[i + 1], col = cols[i], border = NA)
  }
  rect(0.25, zlim[1], 0.60, zlim[2], border = "black")

  axis(4, at = pretty(zlim, 5), las = 1)
  mtext(label, side = 4, line = 2)
}

```

## plot the allele frequency heatmaps for one shift_size, with one page per reg (ave/fit/ext)
```{r}
.apply_filter <- function(df, filter) {
  d <- df
  for (nm in names(filter)) {
    if (!nm %in% names(d)) next
    val <- filter[[nm]]
    if (is.null(val) || length(val) == 0) next
    d <- d[d[[nm]] == val, , drop = FALSE]
  }
  d
}
.build_effect_heatmat <- function(df, filter, xcol = "gen",
                                  breaks_vec,
                                  y = c("signed", "abs"),
                                  z = c("prop", "count", "density", "mean_freq"),
                                  only_segregating = TRUE,
                                  new_only = FALSE,
                                  new_window = 0) {
  y <- match.arg(y)
  z <- match.arg(z)

  d <- .apply_filter(df, filter)
  if (!nrow(d)) return(NULL)
  if (!xcol %in% names(d)) stop("Missing xcol: ", xcol)
  if (!"effect_size" %in% names(d)) stop("Missing effect_size column")
  if (!"frequencies" %in% names(d)) stop("mean_freq requires frequencies column")

  if (only_segregating) {
    d <- d[d$frequencies > 0 & d$frequencies < 1, , drop=FALSE]
    if ("isFixed" %in% names(d)) d <- d[!d$isFixed, , drop=FALSE]
  }

  if (new_only) {
    if (!"originTick" %in% names(d)) stop("new_only requires originTick column")
    d <- d[(d$originTick >= (d[[xcol]] - new_window)) & (d$originTick <= d[[xcol]]), , drop=FALSE]
  }

  if (!nrow(d)) return(NULL)

  gens <- sort(unique(d[[xcol]]))
  x <- as.numeric(gens)

  breaks <- breaks_vec
  mids <- (breaks[-1] + breaks[-length(breaks)]) / 2
  lo <- min(breaks); hi <- max(breaks)

  mat <- matrix(NA_real_, nrow = length(mids), ncol = length(gens))

  for (j in seq_along(gens)) {
    g <- gens[j]
    dg <- d[d[[xcol]] == g, , drop = FALSE]
    if (!nrow(dg)) next

    vv <- as.numeric(dg$effect_size)
    pp <- as.numeric(dg$frequencies)

    keep <- is.finite(vv) & is.finite(pp)
    vv <- vv[keep]; pp <- pp[keep]
    if (y == "abs") vv <- abs(vv)

    # restrict to plotting range
    keep2 <- (vv >= lo & vv <= hi)
    vv <- vv[keep2]; pp <- pp[keep2]
    if (!length(vv)) next

    # bin assignment for effect sizes
    b <- cut(vv, breaks = breaks, include.lowest = TRUE, right = FALSE)
    # mean frequency per bin
    mean_by_bin <- tapply(pp, b, mean, na.rm = TRUE)

    # fill column j; align bin levels
    mat[, j] <- 0  # bins with no mutations => 0 mean frequency (choose NA if you prefer)
    idx_bins <- match(levels(b), names(mean_by_bin))
    mat[idx_bins[!is.na(idx_bins)], j] <- mean_by_bin[na.omit(idx_bins)]
  }

  # replace NA with 0 for plotting if any remain
  mat[is.na(mat)] <- 0

  list(x = x, y = mids, mat = mat, gens = gens, breaks = breaks)
}

.plot_allele_heat_panel <- function(hm, zlim, col, main = NULL, xlab = "", ylab = "",
                             axes = TRUE, box = TRUE) {
  if (is.null(hm)) {
    plot.new()
    if (!is.null(main)) title(main = main)
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  x <- hm$x
  y <- hm$y
  mat <- hm$mat

  plot(NA,
       xlim = range(x), ylim = range(y),
       xlab = xlab, ylab = ylab, main = main,
       xaxs = "i", yaxs = "i", axes = FALSE)

  image(x, y, t(mat), col = col, zlim = zlim, add = TRUE)

  if (axes) { axis(1); axis(2) }
  if (box) box()
  invisible(NULL)
}

.draw_colorbar_panel <- function(zlim, col, label = "Proportion", n = 120) {
  plot.new()
  plot.window(xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = zlim)

  yy <- seq(zlim[1], zlim[2], length.out = n + 1)
  cols <- if (length(col) == n) col else colorRampPalette(col)(n)

  for (i in seq_len(n)) {
    rect(0.25, yy[i], 0.60, yy[i + 1], col = cols[i], border = NA)
  }
  rect(0.25, zlim[1], 0.60, zlim[2], border = "black")

  axis(4, at = pretty(zlim, 5), las = 1)
  mtext(label, side = 4, line = 2)
}

```

```{r}
.delta_p_panel_data <- function(df, filter, t_before = 10000, t_after = 10010,
                                xcol = "gen") {
  d <- df
  # apply filter list (reg/n/psi/shift_size; DO NOT include gen)
  for (nm in names(filter)) {
    if (!nm %in% names(d)) next
    d <- d[d[[nm]] == filter[[nm]], , drop = FALSE]
  }
  if (!nrow(d)) return(NULL)

  # keep segregating only (optional; comment out if you want all)
  if ("frequencies" %in% names(d)) d <- d[d$frequencies > 0 & d$frequencies < 1, , drop=FALSE]
  if ("isFixed" %in% names(d))     d <- d[!d$isFixed, , drop=FALSE]

  # split before/after
  d0 <- d[d[[xcol]] == t_before, c("id","rep","effect_size","frequencies"), drop=FALSE]
  d1 <- d[d[[xcol]] == t_after,  c("id","rep","effect_size","frequencies"), drop=FALSE]
  if (!nrow(d0) || !nrow(d1)) return(NULL)

  names(d0)[names(d0)=="frequencies"] <- "p0"
  names(d1)[names(d1)=="frequencies"] <- "p1"
  names(d0)[names(d0)=="effect_size"] <- "a0"
  names(d1)[names(d1)=="effect_size"] <- "a1"

  # merge by (rep, id) so we compare same allele within same replicate
  m <- merge(d0, d1, by = c("rep","id"), all = FALSE)
  if (!nrow(m)) return(NULL)

  # effect size should be constant; take a0 (or average)
  m$effect <- m$a0
  m$delta_p <- m$p1 - m$p0
  m$delta_p_percentage <- ifelse(m$p0 > 0, m$delta_p / m$p0 * 100, NA_real_)

  m
}

.fit_line_info <- function(x, y) {
  ok <- is.finite(x) & is.finite(y)
  x <- x[ok]; y <- y[ok]
  if (length(x) < 3) return(list(b0=NA_real_, b1=NA_real_))

  fit <- lm(y ~ x)
  co <- coef(fit)  # (Intercept), x
  list(b0 = unname(co[1]), b1 = unname(co[2]))
}


```

```{r}
.delta_p_panel_data_union <- function(df, filter, t_before=10000, t_after=10010, xcol="gen") {
  d <- df
  for (nm in names(filter)) if (nm %in% names(d)) d <- d[d[[nm]] == filter[[nm]], , drop=FALSE]
  if (!nrow(d)) return(NULL)

  # snapshots
  d0 <- d[d[[xcol]] == t_before, c("id","rep","effect_size","frequencies"), drop=FALSE]
  d1 <- d[d[[xcol]] == t_after,  c("id","rep","effect_size","frequencies"), drop=FALSE]
  if (!nrow(d0) && !nrow(d1)) return(NULL)

  names(d0)[names(d0)=="frequencies"] <- "p0"
  names(d1)[names(d1)=="frequencies"] <- "p1"
  names(d0)[names(d0)=="effect_size"] <- "a0"
  names(d1)[names(d1)=="effect_size"] <- "a1"

  m <- merge(d0, d1, by=c("rep","id"), all=TRUE)

  # missing -> absent
  m$p0[is.na(m$p0)] <- 0
  m$p1[is.na(m$p1)] <- 0

  # effect size: pick whichever exists
  m$effect <- ifelse(!is.na(m$a0), m$a0, m$a1)

  m$delta_p <- m$p1 - m$p0

  m <- m[is.finite(m$effect) & is.finite(m$delta_p), c("rep","id","effect","delta_p")]
  if (!nrow(m)) return(NULL)
  m
}

.top_contrib_curves <- function(m, Kmax = 200) {
  if (is.null(m) || !nrow(m)) return(NULL)

  reps <- sort(unique(m$rep))
  if (!length(reps)) return(NULL)

  Kmax_use <- Kmax
  curves <- matrix(NA_real_, nrow = length(reps), ncol = Kmax_use)
  rownames(curves) <- reps
  colnames(curves) <- paste0("K", seq_len(Kmax_use))

  top_stats <- matrix(NA_real_, nrow = length(reps), ncol = 3)
  colnames(top_stats) <- c("top1","top5","top20")
  rownames(top_stats) <- reps

  for (i in seq_along(reps)) {
    r <- reps[i]
    mr <- m[m$rep == r, , drop=FALSE]
    if (!nrow(mr)) next

    # contribution magnitude: |2 a Δp|
    c <- abs(2 * mr$effect * mr$delta_p)
    c <- c[is.finite(c) & c > 0]

    if (!length(c)) next

    c <- sort(c, decreasing = TRUE)
    s <- sum(c)
    if (!is.finite(s) || s <= 0) next

    cum <- cumsum(c) / s
    L <- min(length(cum), Kmax_use)
    curves[i, 1:L] <- cum[1:L]
    if (L < Kmax_use) curves[i, (L+1):Kmax_use] <- 1  # beyond available alleles, fraction=1

    top_stats[i, "top1"]  <- cum[min(1, length(cum))]
    top_stats[i, "top5"]  <- cum[min(5, length(cum))]
    top_stats[i, "top20"] <- cum[min(20, length(cum))]
  }

  list(reps = reps, K = seq_len(Kmax_use), curves = curves, top_stats = top_stats)
}

```

```{r}
get_first_reach_tick <- function(df_sub, ycol = "z_mean", opt_col = "optimum",
                                 tick_col = "tick", frac = 0.9,
                                 shift_tick = 10000) {
  
  df_sub <- df_sub[df_sub[[tick_col]] >= shift_tick, ]
  
  if (nrow(df_sub) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  
  opt_vals <- unique(df_sub[[opt_col]])
  opt_vals <- opt_vals[!is.na(opt_vals) & opt_vals != 0]
  
  if (length(opt_vals) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  
  new_opt <- opt_vals[1]
  thresh  <- frac * new_opt
  
  if (new_opt > 0) {
    hit_ticks <- df_sub[[tick_col]][df_sub[[ycol]] >= thresh]
  } else {
    hit_ticks <- df_sub[[tick_col]][df_sub[[ycol]] <= thresh]
  }
  
  if (length(hit_ticks) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  
  min(hit_ticks)
}

plot_reach_tick_multi <- function(
    df,
    filters,
    labels = list(title = NULL, x = "Tick reaching threshold", y = "Number of replicates"),
    frac = 0.9,
    shift_tick = 10000,
    ycol = "z_mean",
    opt_col = "optimum",
    tick_col = "tick",
    rep_col = "rep",
    cols = NULL,
    ltys = NULL,
    pchs = NULL,
    xlim = NULL,
    ylim = NULL,
    plot_type = c("hist", "points"),
    show_missing = FALSE,
    add_shift_line = TRUE,
    shift_line_col = "gray40",
    shift_line_lty = 2,
    shift_line_lwd = 2,
    lwd = 4,
    cex_pt = 1.8,
    legend_loc = "topright",
    legend_labels = NULL,
    verbose = FALSE
) {
  
  plot_type <- match.arg(plot_type)
  
  n_filters <- length(filters)
  
  if (is.null(cols)) cols <- seq_len(n_filters)
  if (is.null(ltys)) ltys <- rep(1, n_filters)
  if (is.null(pchs)) pchs <- rep(16, n_filters)
  
  reach_list <- vector("list", n_filters)
  names(reach_list) <- paste0("f", seq_len(n_filters))
  
  for (i in seq_along(filters)) {
    filt <- filters[[i]]
    sub_df <- df
    
    for (nm in names(filt)) {
      sub_df <- sub_df[sub_df[[nm]] == filt[[nm]], ]
    }
    
    if (nrow(sub_df) == 0) {
      reach_list[[i]] <- numeric(0)
      next
    }
    
    reps <- sort(unique(sub_df[[rep_col]]))
    
    reach_ticks <- sapply(reps, function(r) {
      rep_df <- sub_df[sub_df[[rep_col]] == r, ]
      get_first_reach_tick(
        df_sub = rep_df,
        ycol = ycol,
        opt_col = opt_col,
        tick_col = tick_col,
        frac = frac,
        shift_tick = shift_tick
      )
    })
    
    if (!show_missing) {
      reach_ticks <- reach_ticks[!is.na(reach_ticks)]
    }
    
    reach_list[[i]] <- reach_ticks
    
    if (verbose) {
      cat("filter", i, ":", length(reach_ticks), "replicates plotted\n")
    }
  }
  
  all_ticks <- unlist(reach_list)
  all_ticks <- all_ticks[!is.na(all_ticks)]
  
  if (length(all_ticks) == 0) {
    plot.new()
    title(
      main = if (!is.null(labels$title)) labels$title else "",
      xlab = if (!is.null(labels$x)) labels$x else "",
      ylab = if (!is.null(labels$y)) labels$y else ""
    )
    text(0.5, 0.5, "No replicates reached the threshold", cex = 1.5)
    return(invisible(reach_list))
  }
  
  if (is.null(xlim)) {
    xlim <- range(all_ticks)
  }
  
  if (plot_type == "hist") {
    breaks_use <- seq(floor(min(all_ticks)) - 0.5, ceiling(max(all_ticks)) + 0.5, by = 1)
    hist_list <- vector("list", n_filters)
    ymax <- 0
    
    for (i in seq_along(reach_list)) {
      x <- reach_list[[i]]
      x <- x[!is.na(x)]
      
      if (length(x) > 0) {
        hh <- hist(x, breaks = breaks_use, plot = FALSE)
        hist_list[[i]] <- hh
        ymax <- max(ymax, hh$counts)
      } else {
        hist_list[[i]] <- NULL
      }
    }
    
    if (is.null(ylim)) ylim <- c(0, ymax * 1.15)
    
    plot(
      NA, NA,
      xlim = xlim,
      ylim = ylim,
      xlab = labels$x,
      ylab = labels$y,
      main = labels$title
    )
    
    for (i in seq_along(hist_list)) {
      hh <- hist_list[[i]]
      if (!is.null(hh)) {
        lines(
          hh$mids, hh$counts,
          type = "b",
          lwd = lwd,
          lty = ltys[i],
          col = cols[i],
          pch = pchs[i],
          cex = cex_pt
        )
      }
    }
    
  } else if (plot_type == "points") {
    
    max_n <- max(sapply(reach_list, function(x) sum(!is.na(x))))
    if (is.null(ylim)) ylim <- c(1, max_n)
    
    plot(
      NA, NA,
      xlim = xlim,
      ylim = ylim,
      xlab = labels$x,
      ylab = labels$y,
      main = labels$title
    )
    
    for (i in seq_along(reach_list)) {
      x <- reach_list[[i]]
      x <- x[!is.na(x)]
      
      if (length(x) > 0) {
        points(
          x = x,
          y = seq_along(x),
          pch = pchs[i],
          cex = cex_pt,
          col = cols[i]
        )
      }
    }
  }
  
  if (add_shift_line && shift_tick >= xlim[1] && shift_tick <= xlim[2]) {
    abline(v = shift_tick, col = shift_line_col, lty = shift_line_lty, lwd = shift_line_lwd)
  }
  
  if (!is.null(legend_labels)) {
    if (plot_type == "hist") {
      legend(
        legend_loc,
        bty = "n",
        legend = legend_labels,
        col = cols,
        lty = ltys,
        lwd = lwd,
        pch = pchs,
        pt.cex = cex_pt
      )
    } else {
      legend(
        legend_loc,
        bty = "n",
        legend = legend_labels,
        col = cols,
        pch = pchs,
        pt.cex = cex_pt
      )
    }
  }
  
  invisible(reach_list)
}
```
